results.rendered_html:
ayuddha (3. a + yu˚)
1〉 adj. unbekämpft, ohne Widerstand: ayuddha idyudhā vṛtaṃ śūra ājati satvabhiḥ  ṚV. 8,45,3 . ayuddho asya vi bhajāni vedaḥ 10,27,10 .
— 2〉 n. Nicht — Kampf  HIT. II, 161 .

results.rendered_html:
ayuddha a. Ved.
1 Not fighting.
2 Unconquered, irresistible.
— ddhaṃ Absence of fighting or war.
Comp.
— sena a. of unconquerable armies (or arrows), irresistible.
